headline: Garmin Ltd. Just Recorded A 14% EPS Beat: Here's What Analysts Are Forecasting Next
summary: Garmin Ltd. ( NYSE:GRMN ) just released its first-quarter report and things are looking bullish. Garmin beat earnings...
